name: pathway-to-christ-goal-tracker
description: Static goal tracker site and browser E2E harness.

scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check auth-client.js && node --check backend-client.js && node --check storage-adapter.js && node --check supabase-browser-adapter.js && node --check tests/e2e-harness.js && node --check tests/production-smoke.js && node --check tests/verify-demo-fixture.js && node tests/verify-demo-fixture.js
